i18n_workflow_examples.overview: Complete end-to-end examples demonstrating common i18n workflows. These examples show the entire process from start to finish for typical translation tasks.

example.name: add_new_translation_keys
example.description: Add new translation keys for API key management feature across all language files
example.scenario: A new API key management feature needs translation keys for title, description, and actions

step.title: List Available Language Files
step.expected_output: en.ts, es.ts, fr.ts, de.ts, pt.ts, zh.ts, ja.ts, ko.ts, ar.ts, he.ts, hi.ts

step.title: Read English File to Find Insertion Point
step.purpose: Find the settings section where API keys should be added

step.title: Add Keys to English File
step.action: <apply_diff> <path>medialake_user_interface/src/i18n/locales/en.ts</path> <diff> <<<<<<< SEARCH :start_line:520 ------- security: "Security", performance: "Performance", }, ======= security: "Security", performance: "Performance", apiKeys: "API Keys", // pragma: allowlist secret }, apiKeys: { title: "API Key Management", description: "Manage API keys for programmatic access", createNew: "Create New API Key", name: "Key Name", expiresAt: "Expires At", actions: { create: "Create Key", revoke: "Revoke", copy: "Copy to Clipboard", }, messages: { created: "API key created successfully", revoked: "API key revoked", copied: "API key copied to clipboard", }, }, >>>>>>> REPLACE </diff> </apply_diff>

step.title: Add Keys to Spanish File
step.action: <apply_diff> <path>medialake_user_interface/src/i18n/locales/es.ts</path> <diff> <<<<<<< SEARCH :start_line:520 ------- security: "Seguridad", performance: "Rendimiento", }, ======= security: "Seguridad", performance: "Rendimiento", apiKeys: "Claves API", // pragma: allowlist secret }, apiKeys: { title: "Gestión de Claves API", description: "Administrar claves API para acceso programático", createNew: "Crear Nueva Clave API", name: "Nombre de la Clave", expiresAt: "Expira el", actions: { create: "Crear Clave", revoke: "Revocar", copy: "Copiar al Portapapeles", }, messages: { created: "Clave API creada exitosamente", revoked: "Clave API revocada", copied: "Clave API copiada al portapapeles", }, }, >>>>>>> REPLACE </diff> </apply_diff>
step.note: Repeat for all other language files

key_learnings.learning: Use read_file to find exact insertion points
Include proper line numbers in apply_diff
Maintain consistent structure across all languages
Translate all values while keeping keys identical

example.name: sync_missing_keys_across_languages
example.description: Find and add missing translation keys in German file based on English
example.scenario: The German translation file is missing some keys that exist in English

step.title: Search for Specific Section in All Files
step.purpose: Check which languages have the collections section

step.title: Read English Collections Section
step.purpose: Get all keys that should exist in collections section

step.title: Read German Collections Section
step.purpose: Compare with English to identify missing keys

step.title: Add Missing Keys to German
step.action: <apply_diff> <path>medialake_user_interface/src/i18n/locales/de.ts</path> <diff> <<<<<<< SEARCH :start_line:145 ------- actions: { createNew: "Neue Sammlung erstellen", view: "Anzeigen", edit: "Bearbeiten", }, ======= actions: { createNew: "Neue Sammlung erstellen", view: "Anzeigen", edit: "Bearbeiten", share: "Teilen", delete: "Löschen", }, deleteDialog: { title: "Sammlung löschen", description: "Möchten Sie diese Sammlung wirklich löschen? Diese Aktion kann nicht rückgängig gemacht werden.", cascadeWarning: "Alle Elemente und Untersammlungen in dieser Sammlung werden ebenfalls entfernt.", cancel: "Abbrechen", confirm: "Löschen", deleting: "Wird gelöscht...", }, >>>>>>> REPLACE </diff> </apply_diff>

key_learnings.learning: Use search_files to quickly compare sections across files
Read both source and target to identify gaps
Add all missing keys in logical groups
Maintain proper nesting and indentation

example.name: fix_interpolation_syntax
example.description: Correct interpolation syntax that was accidentally translated
example.scenario: Variable names in interpolation were incorrectly translated in Spanish file

step.title: Search for Incorrect Interpolation
step.purpose: Find all interpolation patterns to check for errors

step.title: Read English for Correct Variable Names
Fix Spanish Interpolation
step.action: <apply_diff> <path>medialake_user_interface/src/i18n/locales/es.ts</path> <diff> <<<<<<< SEARCH :start_line:126 ------- itemCount: "{{cantidad}} artículos", ======= itemCount: "{{count}} artículos", >>>>>>> REPLACE </diff> </apply_diff>

key_learnings.learning: Variable names must remain unchanged across languages
Use search_files with regex to find interpolation patterns
Compare with English to verify correct variable names
Fix issues immediately to prevent runtime errors

example.name: translate_with_html_preservation
example.description: Translate strings containing HTML tags while preserving markup
example.scenario: Help text contains HTML links that must remain functional in all languages

step.title: Read English Content with HTML
step.expected_content: termsText: "By signing up, you agree to our Terms of Service", helpText: "Visit our Help Center or contact support",

step.title: Translate to French Preserving HTML
step.action: medialake_user_interface/src/i18n/locales/fr.ts <<<<<<< SEARCH :start_line:222 ------- termsText: "By signing up, you agree to our Terms of Service", helpText: "Visit our Help Center or contact support", ======= termsText: "En vous inscrivant, vous acceptez nos Conditions d'utilisation", helpText: "Visitez notre Centre d'aide ou contactez le support", >>>>>>> REPLACE

key_learnings.learning: HTML tags must be preserved exactly
Translate text content only, not tag names or attributes
Maintain proper tag nesting and closure
Keep href and other attributes unchanged unless localizing URLs

example.name: add_pluralization_rules
example.description: Add proper pluralization for a new feature across multiple languages
example.scenario: File count display needs proper plural forms in different languages

step.title: Add English Pluralization
step.action: <apply_diff> <path>medialake_user_interface/src/i18n/locales/en.ts</path> <diff> <<<<<<< SEARCH :start_line:75 ------- noAssetsFound: "No assets found for this connector", ======= noAssetsFound: "No assets found for this connector", fileCount: "{{count}} file" | "{{count}} files", folderCount: "{{count}} folder" | "{{count}} folders", >>>>>>> REPLACE </diff> </apply_diff>

step.title: Add Spanish Pluralization
step.action: <apply_diff> <path>medialake_user_interface/src/i18n/locales/es.ts</path> <diff> <<<<<<< SEARCH :start_line:75 ------- noAssetsFound: "No se encontraron activos para este conector", ======= noAssetsFound: "No se encontraron activos para este conector", fileCount: "{{count}} archivo" | "{{count}} archivos", folderCount: "{{count}} carpeta" | "{{count}} carpetas", >>>>>>> REPLACE </diff> </apply_diff>

step.title: Add Russian Pluralization (Multiple Forms)
step.action: <apply_diff> <path>medialake_user_interface/src/i18n/locales/ru.ts</path> <diff> <<<<<<< SEARCH :start_line:75 ------- noAssetsFound: "Активы для этого коннектора не найдены", ======= noAssetsFound: "Активы для этого коннектора не найдены", fileCount: "{{count}} файл" | "{{count}} файла" | "{{count}} файлов", folderCount: "{{count}} папка" | "{{count}} папки" | "{{count}} папок", >>>>>>> REPLACE </diff> </apply_diff>
step.note: Russian requires three plural forms based on count

key_learnings.learning: Different languages have different pluralization rules
English uses 2 forms, Russian uses 3, Arabic uses 6
Use pipe character to separate plural forms
Include {{count}} variable in all forms

example.name: validate_translation_completeness
example.description: Check all language files for completeness and consistency
example.scenario: After adding many features, ensure all languages are up to date

step.title: Compare Key Counts in Other Languages
step.purpose: Find files with different key counts

step.title: Search for Untranslated Content
step.purpose: Find English-looking text in Spanish file
step.note: Adjust regex pattern for each language's capitalization rules

step.title: Verify Interpolation Variables
step.purpose: Ensure variable names are consistent across files

validation_report.report_structure:
Language: Spanish (es.ts) Total Keys: 487 Missing Keys: 0 Possible Untranslated: 3 Interpolation Issues: 0 Status: Needs Review
Issues Found: - Line 234: "Delete" appears to be in English - Line 456: "Loading..." might need translation - Line 789: Check capitalization of "API"

key_learnings.learning: Use search patterns to count and compare keys
Regular validation prevents drift between languages
Automated checks catch common issues
Create reports to track translation completeness

example.name: translate_markdown_documentation
example.description: Translate markdown documentation while preserving formatting and code blocks
example.scenario: README.md needs to be translated to Spanish as README.es.md

step.title: Create Spanish Version
step.action:
<write_to_file> <path>docs/user-guide.es.md</path> <content> # Guía del Usuario
## Introducción
Esta guía explica cómo usar MediaLake para gestionar sus activos multimedia.
## Primeros Pasos
### Instalación
```bash npm install medialake ```
### Configuración Básica
Para configurar MediaLake, siga estos pasos:
1. Abra el archivo de configuración 2. Configure sus credenciales de AWS 3. Especifique las regiones deseadas
```javascript const config = { region: 'us-east-1', bucket: 'my-media-bucket' }; ```
## Características Principales
### Gestión de Activos
MediaLake permite:
- Cargar archivos multimedia - Organizar contenido en colecciones - Buscar usando metadatos
Para más información, visite nuestra [documentación completa](https://docs.medialake.com).
